message:
perf(core): migrate RuntimeMetrics from AtomicU64/SeqCst to sharded counters

Replace 13 AtomicU64 fields with ShardedCounter/ShardedMax/ShardedGauge.
Eliminates cache-line bouncing and SeqCst ordering overhead on hot paths.
Benchmark-validated: 2.1x-7.6x faster under contention (wa-1sm78).

- Additive counters (segments, events, bytes) → ShardedCounter
- Max trackers (lag, batch size) → ShardedMax
- Timestamps (started_at, last_db_write) → ShardedGauge
- All 16 runtime tests pass unchanged

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
